spec_match.rationale: TCPServerSocket listening for incoming connections — the server-side spec surface for direct-sockets-api.

interactive.rationale: Listener + per-connection tile rendering. Real demo when running in an IWA.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Card promises local control panel for hardware scenarios — page delivers.

edge_cases.rationale: Doesn't show how to gracefully close existing connections when the listener stops. Doesn't show what happens with port conflicts (EADDRINUSE).

design_system.rationale: CSS variables, connection tile uses design system tokens.

openQuestions.title: Show graceful shutdown
openQuestions.detail: Closing the listener should drain existing connections. Add a 'stop listener' button that demonstrates the cleanup semantics.

openQuestions.title: Probe port conflict
openQuestions.detail: Attempting to listen on a port that's already in use should reject. Make this explicit so visitors don't get a silent failure.

summary: Resolved the required ChromeStatus reference; 2 follow-up question(s) remain.
